en: Oh, force of habit. Here you go.
Swiped these from the tech fridge. Oh, nice going. Want a slice?
I noticed a couple hours ago you had a meeting with another possible CEO.
ko: 몇 시간 전에 다른 CEO 후보와 회의한 걸 봤어.

en: I saw him arrive. How'd that go? It was going well.
ko: 그가 도착하는 걸 봤어. 어떻게 됐어?

en: Until he called us to believe the term he used was a chick site.
And I didn't hear anything he said after that.
ko: 그 이후로는 그의 말을 듣지 못했어.

en: Apparently selling clothes makes us a chick site. I mean, really?
ko: 아무래도 옷을 파는 게 우리를 여성 사이트로 만든대.

en: How is this all legit? I couldn't agree more. I find that surprising.
What'd you do for work, then, before you retired?
I was a VP for DexOne. Phone books?
No. I was in charge of printing. Before that, I ran sales and advertising.
ko: 아니. 인쇄를 담당했어. 그 전에 영업을 했어.
